name: codex-discord-harness
description: Operate, QA, and recover a local Codex Discord Harness runtime.

interface.shortDescription: Operate and QA the local Discord bridge for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Discord Harness bundles reusable workflows for checking bot health, restarting the watchdog, running smoke QA, and debugging Discord mirror, archive, and steering issues.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Codex Discord Harness plugin to inspect the local bot status and recommend the next recovery or QA step.
